vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

generated_parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Each risk item needs: id, desc, mit
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces have named exact neighboring subsystem labels and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.
verify.rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent

verify must include a boundary_conditions object: fixture_points [{at:[x,y,z], type:fixed|pinned|roller}], thermal_zones [{at:[x,y,z], W_or_degC:number, role:source|sink}], pressure_faces [{face:string, Pa:number}] for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential thermal management issues due to avionics bay heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling solutions such as heat sinks or active cooling systems.

risk.desc: Belly camera window seal integrity may be compromised under extreme weather conditions.
risk.mit: Use high-quality sealing materials and conduct thorough weather testing.

risk.desc: GPS boom articulation range may be limited due to design constraints.
risk.mit: Review and potentially adjust design parameters to increase articulation range.

risk.desc: Electrical/data path reliability may be affected by environmental factors.
risk.mit: Use robust cabling and connectors rated for harsh environments.

risk.desc: Potential issues with wing spar socket load path under extreme maneuvering loads.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing and review load path design for potential improvements.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window
physics_paths: Load path from wing spar into fuselage spine
Thermal path from avionics bay to fuselage surface
Motion path for GPS boom articulation
Pressure path for belly camera window seal
Electrical/data path for avionics bay access

verify.rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

verify.value: Boundary_conditions include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high temperature difference between source and sink.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as cooling channels or heat sinks.

risk.desc: Limited clearance for snap-fit interfaces may cause assembly difficulties.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance for snap-fit interfaces to ensure easy assembly.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for bolted interfaces may lead to over-tightening and damage.
risk.mit: Ensure proper clearance and torque specifications for bolted interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to minimal clearance in critical interfaces.
risk.mit: Increase clearance in critical interfaces to prevent misalignment during assembly.

risk.desc: Limited access for maintenance and serviceability.
risk.mit: Design additional access panels or service paths for easier maintenance and inspection.

Nacelle tilt motion transmitted through wing spar socket

risk.desc: Potential for thermal stress due to uneven heat dissipation from servos.
